text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka seems to be really struggling with today's
training...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Siiigh... Damn it! My body isn't workin' with me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Am I seriously getting worn out from this? How can I be so lame?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
What?! Why would I do something lame like
that?! I've still got more in me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Wah?! I-I fell?! What's wrong with me?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...She seems really tired. We should probably ease up on how many races we do.
